name: node-popper2
title: node-popper2
summary: Javascript library to position poppers in web applications
description:
Javascript library to position poppers in web applications
A popper is an element on the screen which "pops out" from the natural flow
of your application.
.
This is version 2.x of the Popper library. The older 1.x version is
available in libjs-popper.js. More recent versions have been renamed
to Floating UI.
.
Common examples of poppers are tooltips, popovers and drop-downs.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-popper2 because Javascript library to position poppers in web applications.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-popper2 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-popper2 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-popper2 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
